title: [ME:PE]Military Expedition: Performance Enhanced
description: a modpack that combines optimization, adventure, and gunplay一款结合了优化、冒险与枪械的整合包
body:
![[ME:PE]Military Expedition: Performance Enhanced](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e60178fa113cc646bf43d97527c24d51f93a0854.png)


<details>
<summary>Known bug</summary>

Starting from version 1.1.4, mobile devices and devices that don't support OpenGL 4.6 are not supported, but you can fix this by removing "[AR] Accelerated Rendering."

</details>


<details>

<summary>已知bug</summary>

从1.1.4版本起移动设备与不支持OpenGL4.6的设备不受支持，可通过删除“[AR]加速渲染Accelerated Rendering”以解决

</details>



<details>
<summary>EN</summary>

## ME:PE Modpack Usage Guide & Notes

### Modpack Content：

This modpack packs in as much content as possible with low performance overhead and a small number of mods, including but not limited to **military, adventure, and performance optimization**.

You can embark on survival adventures or player vs. player battles, or use Creative mode for mindless, satisfying mob farming. With **hundreds of guns and dozens of vehicles** — spanning both domestic and international, modern and futuristic — you’ll have plenty of firepower to play and fight with.

Despite its extensive content, the modpack maintains stable, high FPS as described below. It’s no exaggeration to say this modpack can meet all your needs, whether you’re an adventure fan, a low-spec player, or a military enthusiast.

### System Requirements:

Tested Configuration: AMD X4-860K + AMD/ATI Radeon RX-560 Series, paired with BellSoft Liberica Java JDK-17 (8GB RAM allocated / 8192MB).Stable 150+ FPS achievable under default modpack settings.

### Important Notes:

Do NOT update any mods manually. Bug fixes for issues caused by unauthorized updates are your responsibility.

Gun mods have compatibility conflicts with certain shaders. Currently confirmed incompatible shader: Super Duper Vanilla.

Therefore,all shaders will no longer be pre-installed in this modpack.
For shader-related issues: Remove shaders first and then submit a bug report if the problem persists.

### About the Author:

The author is a student, so updates may be slow. Updates are typically rolled out on weekends.

</details>




<details>
<summary>CN</summary>

## ME:PE整合包使用指南及注意事项

### 整合包内容:

该整合包以较低的性能开销和较少的Mod数量尽可能的涵盖更多内容，包括但不限于军事、冒险、性能优化。

你可以在其中使用生存进行冒险或是玩家对战，也可以使用创造进行无脑而又爽的刷怪，本整合包高达数百把的枪械和数十辆载具足够你玩的爽、打得爽，其中覆盖了国内与国外、现代与未来。

在有如此多的内容的同时也能保持如下文的良好FPS，毫不夸张地说，该整合包可以满足你的任何需求，无论是喜爱冒险的人群、低配的人群还是喜爱军事的人群。

### 配置要求：

经测试，AMD X4-860K及AMD/ATI Radeon RX-560 Series配置搭配BellSoft Liberica Java JDK-17内存分配8GB(8192MB)在整合包默认设置下可以较为稳定地保持150FPS+。

### 注意事项：

请勿擅自更新任何Mod，由此引发的Bug请自行解决

枪械Mod对一些光影有兼容性问题，目前已知的光影是Super Duper Vanllia，所以以后该整合包不会再预装任何光影，由光影引发的问题请先尝试删除光影后再发送Bug报告

### 关于作者：

作者是学生，更新较慢，一般在周末更新

</details>
